• Working on something

  Do you want to proceed with this experimental action?

  Reason: this is a synthetic fixture representing a future codex UI
  variant that hasn't been seen yet — no known title phrase matches,
  but the structural signals are all present.

  $ echo synthetic-command-body

› 1. Yes, please do it (y)
  2. No thanks (esc)

  Press enter to confirm or esc to cancel
